title.list: Mary (St. Francis de Sales Parrish House)

location.description: North side of Springfield, East of 47th

inscription: In gratitude for the legacy of Most Blessed Sacrament Parish, 1901-2008 and with praise, love and thanksgiving for all the good done there by the priests, the faithful, and especially the sisters servants of the Immaculate Heart of Mary.
